_source_note: This is a SMALL STARTER SAMPLE for wiring the app together. Replace with the full AGS Beers Criteria ® table before your physician-audit day. Do not distribute the full copyrighted table publicly without checking AGS licensing terms for your use case.

flagged_drugs.rationale: High anticholinergic burden; confusion, dry mouth, constipation, falls risk in older adults.
Increased risk of cognitive impairment, delirium, falls, fractures, and motor vehicle accidents in older adults.
flagged_drugs.recommendation: Avoid for insomnia, agitation, or anxiety except in specific situations (seizure disorders, REM sleep disorder, benzodiazepine withdrawal).

flagged_drugs.rationale: Prolonged hypoglycemia risk in older adults.
flagged_drugs.recommendation: Avoid; prefer shorter-acting sulfonylureas if this class is needed.

flagged_drugs.rationale: Risk of hypotension and myocardial ischemia.
GI bleeding/peptic ulcer risk increases with age; renal risk with chronic scheduled use.
flagged_drugs.recommendation: Avoid chronic scheduled use unless other alternatives are ineffective and a GI-protective agent is co-prescribed.
